zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes De Arderne於1276年出生在英國爾阿爾德福德時，她的父親Peter de Arderne35歲，母親Margery Elleforde31歲。她和William Warmingham DeMainwaring至少有4個女兒。她去世於大約1308年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes De Arderne于1276年出生在英国爾阿爾德福德时，她的父亲Peter de Arderne35岁，母亲Margery Elleforde31岁。她和William Warmingham DeMainwaring至少有4个女儿。她去世于大约1308年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes De Arderne was born in 1276, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, her father, Peter de Arderne, was 35 and her mother, Margery Elleforde, was 31. She had at least 4 daughters with William Warmingham DeMainwaring. She died about 1308, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes De Arderne est née en 1276, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter de Arderne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margery Elleforde, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 filles avec William Warmingham DeMainwaring. Elle est décédée environ 1308, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes De Arderne 1276 in Aldford, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter de Arderne 35 und ihre Mutter Margery Elleforde 31. Sie hatte mit William Warmingham DeMainwaring mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1308 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes De Arderne è nata il nel 1276 nel Aldford, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Peter de Arderne, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margery Elleforde, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figlie con William Warmingham DeMainwaring. Morì circa 1308, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes De Arderneが1276年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで生まれた時，父Peter de Arderneは35歳，母Margery Ellefordeは31歳であった。彼女はWilliam Warmingham DeMainwaringとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1308年にフランスピカーディソンメで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes De Arderne(이)가 1276년 영국 체실르 알드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter de Arderne(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Elleforde(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 William Warmingham DeMainwaring(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1308년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes De Arderne nasceu em 1276, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter de Arderne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margery Elleforde, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhas com William Warmingham DeMainwaring. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1308, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes De Arderne родилась в 1276 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter de Arderne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Elleforde, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 4 дочери от William Warmingham DeMainwaring. Она умерла около 1308 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes De Arderne nació en 1276, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter de Arderne, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margery Elleforde, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con William Warmingham DeMainwaring. Murió aproximadamente 1308, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 33 años.
